content: Thunderbird 140.8.0esr - just as the actual 140.10.0esr version - doesn't have this option which has already been added to the release versions (actually 150.0) some weeks ago (see image of my 150 version. I don't know when the "Reset Folder Order" will be integrated in future esr versions. But I still can move folders around manually in my 140.10.0esr version profile. You have to move them delicately without trembling....
creator: Mapenzi
